Name: Merge Sort
Author: John von Neumann
Description: Merge sort is an efficient, general-purpose, and comparison-based sorting algorithm. Most implementations produce a stable sort, which means that the order of equal elements is the same in the input and output. Merge sort is a divide-and-conquer algorithm that was invented by John von Neumann in 1945.
Algorithm: async function sort(){await async function a(r,t,e){if(t<e){let i=t+Math.floor((e-t)/2);await a(r,t,i),await a(r,i+1,e),await async function(a,r,t,e){let i=t-r+1,n=e-t,f=new Array(i),s=new Array(n);for(let t=0;t<i;t++)f[t]=a[r+t];for(let r=0;r<n;r++)s[r]=a[t+1+r];let w=0,l=0,o=r;for(;w<i&&l<n;){await compare(array.indexOf(f[w]),array.indexOf(s[l]));if(f[w]<=s[l]){if(a[o]=f[w],firstRun)return;swap(o,array.indexOf(f[w])),await sleep(),w++}else{if(a[o]=s[l],firstRun)return;swap(o,array.indexOf(s[l])),await sleep(),l++}o++}for(;w<i;){if(a[o]=f[w],firstRun)return;swap(o,array.indexOf(f[w])),await sleep(),w++,o++}for(;l<n;){if(a[o]=s[l],firstRun)return;swap(o,array.indexOf(s[l])),await sleep(),l++,o++}}(r,t,i,e)}}([...array],0,array.length-1)}

Code.Python:
def merge_sort(arr):
	if len(arr) > 1:
		mid = len(arr) // 2
		L = arr[:mid]
		R = arr[mid:]
		merge_sort(L)
		merge_sort(R)
		i = j = k = 0
		while i < len(L) and j < len(R):
			if L[i] <= R[j]:
				arr[k] = L[i]
				i += 1
			else:
				arr[k] = R[j]
				j += 1
			k += 1
		while i < len(L):
			arr[k] = L[i]
			i += 1
			k += 1
		while j < len(R):
			arr[k] = R[j]
			j += 1
			k += 1
